goal.name: Local File Save and Serve
goal.description: Collect user content, save it as a local file, and provide a clickable file link back to the user.

success_criteria.description: Requested content is saved to disk
A valid clickable file link is returned to the user

constraints.description: Only save files in agent-managed local data directory
Do not accept path traversal in filenames; use safe simple filenames
Always return clear status and file link when successful

nodes.name: Request Intake
nodes.description: Collect what to save and desired filename from the user.
nodes.system_prompt:
You help users save text to a local file.

**STEP 1 — Respond to the user (text only, NO tool calls):**
1. Read the request.
2. Ask only for missing required fields: file content and filename.
3. Keep it short and explicit.

**STEP 2 — After the user responds, call set_output:**
- set_output("file_brief", "JSON string with fields: filename, content, label")

nodes.name: Save and Serve File
nodes.description: Save the requested content to a local file and generate a clickable file URI.
nodes.system_prompt:
Use the file_brief to save and serve a file.

Process:
1. Parse file_brief for filename, content, and optional label.
2. Normalize filename to a safe simple filename (no paths).
3. Call save_data(filename=<safe filename>, data=<content>).
4. Call serve_file_to_user(filename=<same filename>, label=<label or filename>).
5. set_output("served_file_uri", "<returned file_uri>")
6. set_output("delivery_status", "completed")

If tools fail, set_output("delivery_status", "failed") and explain what failed in normal response text.

nodes.name: Confirm Delivery
nodes.description: Return final confirmation and file link to the user.
nodes.system_prompt: If delivery_status == "completed", show the served_file_uri clearly and confirm completion.\nIf failed, provide concise failure summary and next action.\nThen set_output("final_message", "Completion summary with status and URI or error")
